meta.description: Craftlanee provides IT services, web development, SEO, paid ads, social media marketing, branding, analytics, and growth automation for modern businesses.

hero.headline: Websites, campaigns, and systems built to bring your business more qualified leads.
hero.description: Craftlanee helps service brands, local businesses, startups, and growing teams launch stronger websites, rank on search, run smarter ads, and automate the customer journey.

services.title: IT and digital marketing services
services.subtitle: Everything your business needs to look credible, attract the right audience, and convert attention into sales conversations.

items.title: Website & App Development
items.description: Fast, mobile-first websites, landing pages, booking flows, and business apps built around conversions.

items.title: SEO & Local Search
items.description: Technical SEO, content planning, keyword targeting, and Google Business Profile optimization for long-term visibility.

items.title: Paid Ads & Lead Generation
items.description: Google, Meta, and retargeting campaigns planned around cost per lead, funnel quality, and measurable ROI.

items.title: Branding & Social Media
items.description: Brand identity, social content systems, launch campaigns, and creative direction that make your business easier to trust.

items.title: CRM & Automation
items.description: Connect forms, WhatsApp, email follow-ups, sheets, CRMs, and dashboards so inquiries do not get lost.

items.title: Analytics & Reporting
items.description: Clean tracking for traffic, leads, calls, campaigns, and revenue signals so you can see what is working.

portfolio.title: Work built for real business outcomes
portfolio.subtitle: A mix of IT, web, branding, and marketing execution across service businesses and digital-first brands.

items.title: Local Service Growth Stack
items.description: Website redesign, Google Business Profile improvements, SEO pages, and lead forms for a service company.

items.title: Salon Booking Experience
items.description: A polished booking-first web experience with service pages, campaign landing pages, and social launch assets.

items.title: Eco Brand Launch
items.description: Brand messaging, ecommerce-ready site design, launch creatives, and SEO content structure for a new brand.

about.headline: A practical growth partner for technology, marketing, and brand execution.
about.description: We combine IT delivery with digital marketing strategy, so the website, campaigns, tracking, and follow-up systems work together instead of sitting in separate silos.

values.title: Strategy before execution
values.description: We map the offer, audience, funnel, and channel mix before design or campaign work begins.

values.title: Conversion-focused delivery
values.description: Every page, ad, and form is shaped around trust, clarity, speed, and measurable inquiries.

values.title: Systems that scale
values.description: We connect tracking, automation, content, and reporting so growth becomes easier to manage.

contact.headline: Tell us what you need: website, SEO, ads, branding, automation, or the full growth stack.
contact.description: Share your business goal and current digital setup. We will respond with a practical next step and the right service mix.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Service Needed
form.message: Tell us about your business goal

testimonials.quote: Craftlanee gave us a cleaner website, stronger tracking, and campaigns that finally showed where leads were coming from.
testimonials.author: Priya R.

testimonials.quote: Their team understood both the technical side and the marketing side. The new funnel made follow-ups much easier.
testimonials.author: Rohan S.

footer.description: IT services and digital marketing for businesses that need better websites, stronger visibility, and more reliable lead systems.
